title: BPFdoor in Telecom Networks: Sleeper Cells in the Backbone

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - BPFdoor in Telecom Networks: Sleeper Cells in the Backbone
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/01
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*containerd.sock*'
            - '*hpasmlited.pid*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
